## Breaking changes

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING / ROADMAP / CHANGELOG as relevant)
- [ ] If this includes a schema change, the migration is forward-only and has been tested with `supabase migration up`
- [ ] Linked design doc or issue (for non-trivial changes)
